name: Shortbread Wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix together the dry ingredients (flour, sugar, and cornstarch).
3. Melt the butter and stir it into the dry ingredients until well combined.
4. Press the mixture into a circular pan using a fork, with the tines of the fork creating an invitingly crumbly texture on top.
5. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes.
6. Cut into wedges while the cookies are still hot, but allow them to cool completely before removing from the pan.
7. Enjoy!
